ddls:
CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the project category */,
  "min_funding" INTEGER /* Minimum funding goal for the category */,
  "max_funding" INTEGER /* Maximum funding goal for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region associated with the category */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department primarily handling projects in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project category the project belongs to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "funding_goal" INTEGER /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., successful, failed, canceled) */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "actual_cost" INTEGER /* Actual cost incurred by the project */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the project is being executed */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager assigned to the project */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst assigned to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project status record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project category the record belongs to */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Number of successful projects in the category */,
  "failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed projects in the category */,
  "canceled" INTEGER /* Number of canceled projects in the category */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of projects in the category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the projects are being executed */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the projects */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentage_calculations" (
  "calc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage calculation record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project category the record belongs to */,
  "successful" REAL /* Percentage of successful projects in the category */,
  "failed" REAL /* Percentage of failed projects in the category */,
  "canceled" REAL /* Percentage of canceled projects in the category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the projects are being executed */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the projects */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the percentage calculations were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_calculations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project manager belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project manager's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project manager's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analyst's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analyst's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the administrator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the administrator's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the administrator's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_manager_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager assigned to the project */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was assigned to the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst assigned to the project */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was assigned to the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "analyst_id")
)
